name: @usenami/signer-mcp
description: Sign CEX orders (Binance, OKX, Asterdex) from any MCP-aware AI agent with keys that never leave an AWS Nitro Enclave.

SIGNER_GATEWAY_URL.description: Override the Signer gateway URL (default: https://signer.usenami.io)

SIGNER_API_TOKEN.description: Bearer token issued by usenami.io/signer. Required for everything except list_venues.

tools.name: list_venues
tools.description: List the venues supported by this Signer. Read-only static manifest — no gateway call.

tools.name: get_attestation
tools.description: Return the AWS Nitro attestation document (PCR0+sig) for the running enclave.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Return equity, free margin, and open positions for a venue.

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Sign and submit a single market or limit order. Enclave enforces policy caps.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel an outstanding order by venue order_id. Idempotent.
